title: elatine schkuhriana
intro: Elatine schkuhriana, also known as Schkuhria, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is a member of the daisy family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Elatine schkuhriana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
